title: Add Film ze Snu to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Film ze Snu](https://sen.i-ty.pl) to video_audio
- Convert multilingual dream descriptions or voice recordings into a 4-scene AI-generated film with screenplay, cinematic images, voice narration, and background music using Film ze Snu.

Fixes #9173

gist.headline: Dreams on screen
gist.blurb: Film ze Snu just landed in the greenhouse! This magical app turns your dream descriptions or voice recordings into a 4-scene AI-generated film complete with narration and music.
gist.summary: Added 'Film ze Snu' to the community apps showcase, a tool that converts multilingual dream descriptions and voice recordings into 4-scene AI-generated films.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Film ze Snu in the apps directory to turn their dreams into cinematic videos featuring screenplays, voice narration, and background music.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app that turns dreams into films. Key symbols: sleep/dreams (clouds, thought bubbles), film/video (film reels, camera). Characters: Polly the bee. Scene: Polly as a movie director on a fluffy cloud, filming a dream sequence.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny movie director's beret, sitting on a fluffy cloud and looking through a retro film camera. A glowing thought bubble above her shows a cinematic landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
